[HOOK].text: What if I told you a city existed that was 9,000 years ahead of its time? | TEXT: UNBELIEVABLE
[HOOK].visual_prompt: Young archaeologist searching through dusty books in a library

[CURIOSITY].text: Imagine a place where technology and nature harmonized, where people lived in perfect balance. | TEXT: PARADISE FOUND
[CURIOSITY].visual_prompt: Person standing at the edge of a futuristic-looking city, looking out at the ocean

[EXPLANATION].text: Atlantis, a city of innovation and discovery, was lost to the sands of time. But its legacy lives on. | TEXT: SECRETS REVEALED
[EXPLANATION].visual_prompt: Historian pouring over ancient maps and texts, eyes widening with excitement

[INSIGHT].text: What can we learn from a civilization that rose and fell in the blink of an eye? | TEXT: INSPIRATION AHEAD
[INSIGHT].visual_prompt: Entrepreneur working late at a glowing desk, surrounded by ideas and inspiration

[ENDING].text: Believe in the impossible, and you might just find your own Atlantis.
[ENDING].visual_prompt: Person standing on a rooftop at sunset, looking out at the city with determination
